description: Model recommendations for forensics agents by provider

recon-agent.rationale: System profiling requires moderate reasoning and tool use

triage-agent.rationale: Quick triage needs fast, accurate analysis of volatile data

log-analyst.rationale: Log analysis requires pattern matching and anomaly detection

persistence-hunter.rationale: Persistence detection requires systematic sweep methodology

container-analyst.rationale: Container forensics requires Docker/K8s domain knowledge

network-analyst.rationale: Network analysis requires protocol understanding and C2 detection patterns

memory-analyst.rationale: Memory forensics requires deep reasoning for complex artifact interpretation

cloud-analyst.rationale: Cloud forensics requires multi-provider API knowledge

timeline-builder.rationale: Timeline correlation requires complex multi-source reasoning

ioc-analyst.rationale: IOC extraction and enrichment follows structured patterns

reporting-agent.rationale: Report generation requires clear technical writing

forensics-orchestrator.rationale: Orchestration requires complex planning and multi-agent coordination
